Forside - Nordkapp kommune

https://www.nordkapp.kommune.no/
Avvik: 255 | Bestått: 562
2.4.2 Sidetittel (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.2 (2.4.2 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Page is missing h1 heading

<body class="hid2670 kommunemal templsetid9 pagelevel0 page502060 ppt502060 pagelogo frontpage pgn_forside cprilangen clangen articlelisting hassubmenuitem langno mofebruar AAAA"> <a class="show-for-s
Add a single h1 heading that describes the page content
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (6 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="searchtitle">Søk</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group '193561' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input id="el193561_0" name="193561" onchange="sfbCommentRequired(this); return cpsRadioSelected(this);" onclick="return cpsRadioSelected(this);" type="radio" value="388925"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group '193563' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input id="el193563_0" name="193563" onchange="return cpsRadioSelected(this);" onclick="return cpsRadioSelected(this);" type="radio" value="388927"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')

2.4.4 Formål med lenke (4 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text is very long (128 characters)

<a class="headlinelink" href="/kunngjoering-av-vedtak-om-innvilget-dispensasjon-for-etablering-av-fysiske-skredsikringstiltak-mot-snoeskred-i-honningsvaag-sentrum.6730521-502061.html">Kunngjøring av v
Shorten link text to be concise while remaining descriptive
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="facebooklink" href="http://www.facebook.com/nordkappkommune" target="_blank"><img alt="Facebook" src="/cpclass/run/sitefeedback/images/feedback-icon-facebook.png" title="Facebook"/></a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="http://www.facebook.com/nordkappkommune" target="_blank"><span class="show-for-sr">Facebook</span><i class="fi-social-facebook"></i></a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="cp" href="https://www.custompublish.com/" target="_blank">Web levert av CustomPublish</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Søk..." type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Ka du leite etter?" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" id="frontpageinput" name="find" placeholder="Hva kan vi hjelpe deg med?" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<textarea aria-hidden="true" style='min-height: 0px !important; max-height: none !important; height: 0px !important; visibility: hidden !important; overflow: hidden !important; position: absolute !imp
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
1.3.5 Identifiser inndataformål (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'asebaeeaname' missing autocomplete attribute

<input auto-fill="new-password" class="sfc-important" name="asebaeeaname" size="8" title="Last name" type="text" value=""/>
Add autocomplete='name' to help users fill in the form
2.1.1 Tastatur (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive textarea has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<textarea aria-hidden="true" style='min-height: 0px !important; max-height: none !important; height: 0px !important; visibility: hidden !important; overflow: hidden !important; position: absolute !imp
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state

https://www.nordkapp.kommune.no/broeyting-og-stroeing.576430.no.html
Avvik: 293 | Bestått: 394
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg class="shareoniconsvg shareoniconsvg-facebook" height="24" version="1.1" viewbox="0 0 24 24" width="24" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"><path d="M17,
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg class="shareoniconsvg shareoniconsvg-twitter" height="24" version="1.1" viewbox="0 0 24 24" width="24" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"><path d="M22.4
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative

SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg class="shareoniconsvg shareoniconsvg-printlink" height="24" version="1.1" viewbox="0 0 24 24" width="24" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"><path d="M18
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (8 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="searchtitle">Søk</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group '193561' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input id="el193561_0" name="193561" onchange="sfbCommentRequired(this); return cpsRadioSelected(this);" onclick="return cpsRadioSelected(this);" type="radio" value="388925"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group '193563' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input id="el193563_0" name="193563" onchange="return cpsRadioSelected(this);" onclick="return cpsRadioSelected(this);" type="radio" value="388927"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

Data table has no caption or label

<table border="1" cellpadding="1" cellspacing="1" style="width:100%;"> <thead> <tr> <th scope="col"><strong>Prioritet</strong></th> <th scope="col"><strong>Type</strong></th> <th scope="col"><strong>B

2.4.4 Formål med lenke (7 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a aria-label="Facebook" class="toollink shareonlink facebooklink" href="http://www.facebook.com/share.php?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.nordkapp.kommune.no%2Fbroeyting-og-stroeing.576430.no.html" onclick="retur
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link with href='#' and onclick should be a button

<a aria-label="Twitter" class="toollink shareonlink twitter" href="#" onclick="return twitThisTwo(document.title, '', location.href, 3);"> <!-- <img src="/images/shareon/shareon-twitter.png" alt="Del
Use <button> element for interactive controls, or add role='button'
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link with href='#' and onclick should be a button

<a aria-label="Tips en venn" class="toollink tipslink tipslinkicon" href="#" onclick="location.href='/broeyting-og-stroeing.576430.no.html?showtipform=2#tips'; return false;" title="Tips en venn"> <!-
Use <button> element for interactive controls, or add role='button'
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link with href='#' and onclick should be a button

<a aria-label="Skriv ut" class="toollink printlink printlinkicon" href="#" onclick="window.print(); return false;" rel="nofollow" title="Skriv ut"> <!-- <img src="/images/shareon/shareon-print.png" wi
Use <button> element for interactive controls, or add role='button'
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="facebooklink" href="http://www.facebook.com/nordkappkommune" target="_blank"><img alt="Facebook" src="/cpclass/run/sitefeedback/images/feedback-icon-facebook.png" title="Facebook"/></a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="http://www.facebook.com/nordkappkommune" target="_blank"><span class="show-for-sr">Facebook</span><i class="fi-social-facebook"></i></a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="cp" href="https://www.custompublish.com/" target="_blank">Web levert av CustomPublish</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Søk..." type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Ka du leite etter?" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<textarea aria-hidden="true" style='min-height: 0px !important; max-height: none !important; height: 0px !important; visibility: hidden !important; overflow: hidden !important; position: absolute !imp
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
1.3.5 Identifiser inndataformål (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'asebbdaename' missing autocomplete attribute

<input auto-fill="new-password" class="sfc-important" name="asebbdaename" size="8" title="Last name" type="text" value=""/>
Add autocomplete='name' to help users fill in the form
2.1.1 Tastatur (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive textarea has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<textarea aria-hidden="true" style='min-height: 0px !important; max-height: none !important; height: 0px !important; visibility: hidden !important; overflow: hidden !important; position: absolute !imp
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state
4.1.1 Parsing (2 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: '{33647fd6-ec58-490f-a630-9fe0ec6016cf}{253}' appears 3 times

id="{33647fd6-ec58-490f-a630-9fe0ec6016cf}{253}"
Each ID must be unique on the page
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: '143210646' appears 3 times

id="143210646"
Each ID must be unique on the page
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (267 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

<a class="logo cell small-8" href="/" id="logolinkmobile"> <img alt="Nordkapp kommune logo" class="rs_skip logoimg" id="logomobile" src="https://img0.custompublish.com/getfile.php/4943040.2670.qsw7jaj
Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden

SERIOUS

<button aria-label="Close menu" class="rs_skip close-button" data-close="" type="button"> <span aria-hidden="true">×</span> <span class="show-for-sr">Meny</span> </button>

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (7 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="searchtitle">Søk</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group '193561' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input id="el193561_0" name="193561" onchange="sfbCommentRequired(this); return cpsRadioSelected(this);" onclick="return cpsRadioSelected(this);" type="radio" value="388925"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group '193563' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input id="el193563_0" name="193563" onchange="return cpsRadioSelected(this);" onclick="return cpsRadioSelected(this);" type="radio" value="388927"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>

MODERATE

2.4.4 Formål med lenke (3 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="facebooklink" href="http://www.facebook.com/nordkappkommune" target="_blank"><img alt="Facebook" src="/cpclass/run/sitefeedback/images/feedback-icon-facebook.png" title="Facebook"/></a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="http://www.facebook.com/nordkappkommune" target="_blank"><span class="show-for-sr">Facebook</span><i class="fi-social-facebook"></i></a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="cp" href="https://www.custompublish.com/" target="_blank">Web levert av CustomPublish</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Søk..." type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Ka du leite etter?" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<textarea aria-hidden="true" style='min-height: 0px !important; max-height: none !important; height: 0px !important; visibility: hidden !important; overflow: hidden !important; position: absolute !imp
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
1.3.5 Identifiser inndataformål (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'asebfbdcname' missing autocomplete attribute

<input auto-fill="new-password" class="sfc-important" name="asebfbdcname" size="8" title="Last name" type="text" value=""/>
Add autocomplete='name' to help users fill in the form
2.1.1 Tastatur (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive textarea has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<textarea aria-hidden="true" style='min-height: 0px !important; max-height: none !important; height: 0px !important; visibility: hidden !important; overflow: hidden !important; position: absolute !imp
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (7 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="searchtitle">Søk</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

2.4.4 Formål med lenke (7 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a aria-label="Facebook" class="toollink shareonlink facebooklink" href="http://www.facebook.com/share.php?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.nordkapp.kommune.no%2Fppt-og-logoped.565128.no.html" onclick="return fbs_c
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link with href='#' and onclick should be a button

<a aria-label="Twitter" class="toollink shareonlink twitter" href="#" onclick="return twitThisTwo(document.title, '', location.href, 3);"> <!-- <img src="/images/shareon/shareon-twitter.png" alt="Del
Use <button> element for interactive controls, or add role='button'
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link with href='#' and onclick should be a button

<a aria-label="Tips en venn" class="toollink tipslink tipslinkicon" href="#" onclick="location.href='/ppt-og-logoped.565128.no.html?showtipform=2#tips'; return false;" title="Tips en venn"> <!-- <img
Use <button> element for interactive controls, or add role='button'
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link with href='#' and onclick should be a button

<a aria-label="Skriv ut" class="toollink printlink printlinkicon" href="#" onclick="window.print(); return false;" rel="nofollow" title="Skriv ut"> <!-- <img src="/images/shareon/shareon-print.png" wi
Use <button> element for interactive controls, or add role='button'
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="facebooklink" href="http://www.facebook.com/nordkappkommune" target="_blank"><img alt="Facebook" src="/cpclass/run/sitefeedback/images/feedback-icon-facebook.png" title="Facebook"/></a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Søk..." type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Ka du leite etter?" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<textarea aria-hidden="true" style='min-height: 0px !important; max-height: none !important; height: 0px !important; visibility: hidden !important; overflow: hidden !important; position: absolute !imp
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
1.3.5 Identifiser inndataformål (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'asebecbcname' missing autocomplete attribute

<input auto-fill="new-password" class="sfc-important" name="asebecbcname" size="8" title="Last name" type="text" value=""/>
Add autocomplete='name' to help users fill in the form

Start your heading structure with h1

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Søk..." type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Ka du leite etter?" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<textarea aria-hidden="true" style='min-height: 0px !important; max-height: none !important; height: 0px !important; visibility: hidden !important; overflow: hidden !important; position: absolute !imp
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id

MODERATE

Personal data field 'asebcaabname' missing autocomplete attribute

<input auto-fill="new-password" class="sfc-important" name="asebcaabname" size="8" title="Last name" type="text" value=""/>
Add autocomplete='name' to help users fill in the form

Avvik: 273 | Bestått: 355

Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="searchtitle">Søk</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group '193561' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input id="el193561_0" name="193561" onchange="sfbCommentRequired(this); return cpsRadioSelected(this);" onclick="return cpsRadioSelected(this);" type="radio" value="388925"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)

Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="http://www.facebook.com/nordkappkommune" target="_blank"><span class="show-for-sr">Facebook</span><i class="fi-social-facebook"></i></a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Søk..." type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Ka du leite etter?" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<textarea aria-hidden="true" style='min-height: 0px !important; max-height: none !important; height: 0px !important; visibility: hidden !important; overflow: hidden !important; position: absolute !imp
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
1.3.5 Identifiser inndataformål (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'asebbedaname' missing autocomplete attribute

<input auto-fill="new-password" class="sfc-important" name="asebbedaname" size="8" title="Last name" type="text" value=""/>
Add autocomplete='name' to help users fill in the form

Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state

Link opens in new window without indication

Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link with href='#' and onclick should be a button

<a aria-label="Twitter" class="toollink shareonlink twitter" href="#" onclick="return twitThisTwo(document.title, '', location.href, 3);"> <!-- <img src="/images/shareon/shareon-twitter.png" alt="Del
Use <button> element for interactive controls, or add role='button'
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Søk..." type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Ka du leite etter?" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<textarea aria-hidden="true" style='min-height: 0px !important; max-height: none !important; height: 0px !important; visibility: hidden !important; overflow: hidden !important; position: absolute !imp
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id

MODERATE

Personal data field 'asebcfbcname' missing autocomplete attribute

https://www.nordkapp.kommune.no/kultur-og-fritid.565078.no.html
Avvik: 281 | Bestått: 386
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (7 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="searchtitle">Søk</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group '193561' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input id="el193561_0" name="193561" onchange="sfbCommentRequired(this); return cpsRadioSelected(this);" onclick="return cpsRadioSelected(this);" type="radio" value="388925"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

<input id="el193563_0" name="193563" onchange="return cpsRadioSelected(this);" onclick="return cpsRadioSelected(this);" type="radio" value="388927"/>

2.4.4 Formål med lenke (3 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="facebooklink" href="http://www.facebook.com/nordkappkommune" target="_blank"><img alt="Facebook" src="/cpclass/run/sitefeedback/images/feedback-icon-facebook.png" title="Facebook"/></a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="http://www.facebook.com/nordkappkommune" target="_blank"><span class="show-for-sr">Facebook</span><i class="fi-social-facebook"></i></a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Søk..." type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Ka du leite etter?" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<textarea aria-hidden="true" style='min-height: 0px !important; max-height: none !important; height: 0px !important; visibility: hidden !important; overflow: hidden !important; position: absolute !imp
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
1.3.5 Identifiser inndataformål (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'asebbbabname' missing autocomplete attribute

<input auto-fill="new-password" class="sfc-important" name="asebbbabname" size="8" title="Last name" type="text" value=""/>
Add autocomplete='name' to help users fill in the form

Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state

Eiendomsskatt - Nordkapp kommune

https://www.nordkapp.kommune.no/eiendomsskatt.578498.no.html
Avvik: 279 | Bestått: 348
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (7 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="searchtitle">Søk</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group '193561' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input id="el193561_0" name="193561" onchange="sfbCommentRequired(this); return cpsRadioSelected(this);" onclick="return cpsRadioSelected(this);" type="radio" value="388925"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group '193563' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input id="el193563_0" name="193563" onchange="return cpsRadioSelected(this);" onclick="return cpsRadioSelected(this);" type="radio" value="388927"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav class="main-navigation-mobile rs_skip"> <ul class="vertical menu mobilemenu menulevel0" id="mobilemenuone"> <li class="menuitem itemlvlnum2 menulevel1 menu577945 menu577945 menuredir" data-cat="5

2.4.4 Formål med lenke (3 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="facebooklink" href="http://www.facebook.com/nordkappkommune" target="_blank"><img alt="Facebook" src="/cpclass/run/sitefeedback/images/feedback-icon-facebook.png" title="Facebook"/></a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="http://www.facebook.com/nordkappkommune" target="_blank"><span class="show-for-sr">Facebook</span><i class="fi-social-facebook"></i></a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="cp" href="https://www.custompublish.com/" target="_blank">Web levert av CustomPublish</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Søk..." type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Ka du leite etter?" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<textarea aria-hidden="true" style='min-height: 0px !important; max-height: none !important; height: 0px !important; visibility: hidden !important; overflow: hidden !important; position: absolute !imp
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
1.3.5 Identifiser inndataformål (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'asebbeaename' missing autocomplete attribute

<input auto-fill="new-password" class="sfc-important" name="asebbeaename" size="8" title="Last name" type="text" value=""/>
Add autocomplete='name' to help users fill in the form
2.1.1 Tastatur (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive textarea has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<textarea aria-hidden="true" style='min-height: 0px !important; max-height: none !important; height: 0px !important; visibility: hidden !important; overflow: hidden !important; position: absolute !imp
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state

SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (7 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="searchtitle">Søk</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group '193561' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input id="el193561_0" name="193561" onchange="sfbCommentRequired(this); return cpsRadioSelected(this);" onclick="return cpsRadioSelected(this);" type="radio" value="388925"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group '193563' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input id="el193563_0" name="193563" onchange="return cpsRadioSelected(this);" onclick="return cpsRadioSelected(this);" type="radio" value="388927"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

2.4.4 Formål med lenke (7 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a aria-label="Facebook" class="toollink shareonlink facebooklink" href="http://www.facebook.com/share.php?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.nordkapp.kommune.no%2Fppt-og-logoped.574153.no.html" onclick="return fbs_c
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link with href='#' and onclick should be a button

<a aria-label="Twitter" class="toollink shareonlink twitter" href="#" onclick="return twitThisTwo(document.title, '', location.href, 3);"> <!-- <img src="/images/shareon/shareon-twitter.png" alt="Del
Use <button> element for interactive controls, or add role='button'
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link with href='#' and onclick should be a button

<a aria-label="Tips en venn" class="toollink tipslink tipslinkicon" href="#" onclick="location.href='/ppt-og-logoped.574153.no.html?showtipform=2#tips'; return false;" title="Tips en venn"> <!-- <img
Use <button> element for interactive controls, or add role='button'
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link with href='#' and onclick should be a button

<a aria-label="Skriv ut" class="toollink printlink printlinkicon" href="#" onclick="window.print(); return false;" rel="nofollow" title="Skriv ut"> <!-- <img src="/images/shareon/shareon-print.png" wi
Use <button> element for interactive controls, or add role='button'
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="facebooklink" href="http://www.facebook.com/nordkappkommune" target="_blank"><img alt="Facebook" src="/cpclass/run/sitefeedback/images/feedback-icon-facebook.png" title="Facebook"/></a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="http://www.facebook.com/nordkappkommune" target="_blank"><span class="show-for-sr">Facebook</span><i class="fi-social-facebook"></i></a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="cp" href="https://www.custompublish.com/" target="_blank">Web levert av CustomPublish</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Søk..." type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Ka du leite etter?" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<textarea aria-hidden="true" style='min-height: 0px !important; max-height: none !important; height: 0px !important; visibility: hidden !important; overflow: hidden !important; position: absolute !imp
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
1.3.5 Identifiser inndataformål (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'asebdbadname' missing autocomplete attribute

<input auto-fill="new-password" class="sfc-important" name="asebdbadname" size="8" title="Last name" type="text" value=""/>
Add autocomplete='name' to help users fill in the form
2.1.1 Tastatur (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive textarea has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<textarea aria-hidden="true" style='min-height: 0px !important; max-height: none !important; height: 0px !important; visibility: hidden !important; overflow: hidden !important; position: absolute !imp
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (264 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

<a class="logo cell small-8" href="/" id="logolinkmobile"> <img alt="Nordkapp kommune logo" class="rs_skip logoimg" id="logomobile" src="https://img0.custompublish.com/getfile.php/4943040.2670.qsw7jaj
Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

<button aria-label="Close menu" class="rs_skip close-button" data-close="" type="button"> <span aria-hidden="true">×</span> <span class="show-for-sr">Meny</span> </button>
Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (7 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="searchtitle">Søk</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1

2.4.4 Formål med lenke (8 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://w2.brreg.no/frivillighetsregisteret/soekevalg.jsp?navn=&Hovedkategori=0&Kategori2=&regionsnr=100&fylkesnr=54&kommunenr=5435" target="_blank">brreg.no</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a aria-label="Facebook" class="toollink shareonlink facebooklink" href="http://www.facebook.com/share.php?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.nordkapp.kommune.no%2Ffrivillige-lag-og-foreninger.583582.no.html" onclick
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link with href='#' and onclick should be a button

<a aria-label="Twitter" class="toollink shareonlink twitter" href="#" onclick="return twitThisTwo(document.title, '', location.href, 3);"> <!-- <img src="/images/shareon/shareon-twitter.png" alt="Del
Use <button> element for interactive controls, or add role='button'
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link with href='#' and onclick should be a button

<a aria-label="Tips en venn" class="toollink tipslink tipslinkicon" href="#" onclick="location.href='/frivillige-lag-og-foreninger.583582.no.html?showtipform=2#tips'; return false;" title="Tips en ven

MODERATE

Link with href='#' and onclick should be a button

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Søk..." type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Ka du leite etter?" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<textarea aria-hidden="true" style='min-height: 0px !important; max-height: none !important; height: 0px !important; visibility: hidden !important; overflow: hidden !important; position: absolute !imp
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
1.3.5 Identifiser inndataformål (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'asebdedbname' missing autocomplete attribute

<input auto-fill="new-password" class="sfc-important" name="asebdedbname" size="8" title="Last name" type="text" value=""/>
Add autocomplete='name' to help users fill in the form

Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state

Start your heading structure with h1

2.4.4 Formål med lenke (7 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a aria-label="Facebook" class="toollink shareonlink facebooklink" href="http://www.facebook.com/share.php?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.nordkapp.kommune.no%2Fergoterapi.575785.no.html" onclick="return fbs_click
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link with href='#' and onclick should be a button

<a aria-label="Twitter" class="toollink shareonlink twitter" href="#" onclick="return twitThisTwo(document.title, '', location.href, 3);"> <!-- <img src="/images/shareon/shareon-twitter.png" alt="Del
Use <button> element for interactive controls, or add role='button'
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link with href='#' and onclick should be a button

<a aria-label="Tips en venn" class="toollink tipslink tipslinkicon" href="#" onclick="location.href='/ergoterapi.575785.no.html?showtipform=2#tips'; return false;" title="Tips en venn"> <!-- <img src=
Use <button> element for interactive controls, or add role='button'
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link with href='#' and onclick should be a button

<a aria-label="Skriv ut" class="toollink printlink printlinkicon" href="#" onclick="window.print(); return false;" rel="nofollow" title="Skriv ut"> <!-- <img src="/images/shareon/shareon-print.png" wi
Use <button> element for interactive controls, or add role='button'
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="facebooklink" href="http://www.facebook.com/nordkappkommune" target="_blank"><img alt="Facebook" src="/cpclass/run/sitefeedback/images/feedback-icon-facebook.png" title="Facebook"/></a>

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Søk..." type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Ka du leite etter?" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<textarea aria-hidden="true" style='min-height: 0px !important; max-height: none !important; height: 0px !important; visibility: hidden !important; overflow: hidden !important; position: absolute !imp
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id

MODERATE

Personal data field 'asebfdefname' missing autocomplete attribute

<input auto-fill="new-password" class="sfc-important" name="asebfdefname" size="8" title="Last name" type="text" value=""/>
Add autocomplete='name' to help users fill in the form

Start your heading structure with h1

2.4.4 Formål med lenke (7 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a aria-label="Facebook" class="toollink shareonlink facebooklink" href="http://www.facebook.com/share.php?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.nordkapp.kommune.no%2Fomsorgsboliger.580625.no.html" onclick="return fbs_c
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link with href='#' and onclick should be a button

<a aria-label="Twitter" class="toollink shareonlink twitter" href="#" onclick="return twitThisTwo(document.title, '', location.href, 3);"> <!-- <img src="/images/shareon/shareon-twitter.png" alt="Del
Use <button> element for interactive controls, or add role='button'
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link with href='#' and onclick should be a button

<a aria-label="Tips en venn" class="toollink tipslink tipslinkicon" href="#" onclick="location.href='/omsorgsboliger.580625.no.html?showtipform=2#tips'; return false;" title="Tips en venn"> <!-- <img
Use <button> element for interactive controls, or add role='button'
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link with href='#' and onclick should be a button

<a aria-label="Skriv ut" class="toollink printlink printlinkicon" href="#" onclick="window.print(); return false;" rel="nofollow" title="Skriv ut"> <!-- <img src="/images/shareon/shareon-print.png" wi
Use <button> element for interactive controls, or add role='button'
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Søk..." type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Ka du leite etter?" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<textarea aria-hidden="true" style='min-height: 0px !important; max-height: none !important; height: 0px !important; visibility: hidden !important; overflow: hidden !important; position: absolute !imp
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
1.3.5 Identifiser inndataformål (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'asebcedfname' missing autocomplete attribute

<input auto-fill="new-password" class="sfc-important" name="asebcedfname" size="8" title="Last name" type="text" value=""/>
Add autocomplete='name' to help users fill in the form

1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (7 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="searchtitle">Søk</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group '193561' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input id="el193561_0" name="193561" onchange="sfbCommentRequired(this); return cpsRadioSelected(this);" onclick="return cpsRadioSelected(this);" type="radio" value="388925"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

<input id="el193563_0" name="193563" onchange="return cpsRadioSelected(this);" onclick="return cpsRadioSelected(this);" type="radio" value="388927"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

2.4.4 Formål med lenke (7 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a aria-label="Facebook" class="toollink shareonlink facebooklink" href="http://www.facebook.com/share.php?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.nordkapp.kommune.no%2Ftt-kort.575787.no.html" onclick="return fbs_click()"
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link with href='#' and onclick should be a button

<a aria-label="Twitter" class="toollink shareonlink twitter" href="#" onclick="return twitThisTwo(document.title, '', location.href, 3);"> <!-- <img src="/images/shareon/shareon-twitter.png" alt="Del
Use <button> element for interactive controls, or add role='button'
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link with href='#' and onclick should be a button

<a aria-label="Tips en venn" class="toollink tipslink tipslinkicon" href="#" onclick="location.href='/tt-kort.575787.no.html?showtipform=2#tips'; return false;" title="Tips en venn"> <!-- <img src="/i
Use <button> element for interactive controls, or add role='button'
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link with href='#' and onclick should be a button

<a aria-label="Skriv ut" class="toollink printlink printlinkicon" href="#" onclick="window.print(); return false;" rel="nofollow" title="Skriv ut"> <!-- <img src="/images/shareon/shareon-print.png" wi
Use <button> element for interactive controls, or add role='button'
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="facebooklink" href="http://www.facebook.com/nordkappkommune" target="_blank"><img alt="Facebook" src="/cpclass/run/sitefeedback/images/feedback-icon-facebook.png" title="Facebook"/></a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="http://www.facebook.com/nordkappkommune" target="_blank"><span class="show-for-sr">Facebook</span><i class="fi-social-facebook"></i></a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="cp" href="https://www.custompublish.com/" target="_blank">Web levert av CustomPublish</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Søk..." type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Ka du leite etter?" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<textarea aria-hidden="true" style='min-height: 0px !important; max-height: none !important; height: 0px !important; visibility: hidden !important; overflow: hidden !important; position: absolute !imp
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
1.3.5 Identifiser inndataformål (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'asebebfdname' missing autocomplete attribute

<input auto-fill="new-password" class="sfc-important" name="asebebfdname" size="8" title="Last name" type="text" value=""/>
Add autocomplete='name' to help users fill in the form
2.1.1 Tastatur (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive textarea has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<textarea aria-hidden="true" style='min-height: 0px !important; max-height: none !important; height: 0px !important; visibility: hidden !important; overflow: hidden !important; position: absolute !imp
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (271 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Søk..." type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Ka du leite etter?" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<textarea aria-hidden="true" style='min-height: 0px !important; max-height: none !important; height: 0px !important; visibility: hidden !important; overflow: hidden !important; position: absolute !imp
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id

Din beredskap - Nordkapp kommune

https://www.nordkapp.kommune.no/din-beredskap.565156.no.html
Avvik: 283 | Bestått: 372
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (7 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h2, should start with h1

<h2 class="searchtitle">Søk</h2>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group '193561' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input id="el193561_0" name="193561" onchange="sfbCommentRequired(this); return cpsRadioSelected(this);" onclick="return cpsRadioSelected(this);" type="radio" value="388925"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group '193563' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input id="el193563_0" name="193563" onchange="return cpsRadioSelected(this);" onclick="return cpsRadioSelected(this);" type="radio" value="388927"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

2.4.4 Formål med lenke (3 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="facebooklink" href="http://www.facebook.com/nordkappkommune" target="_blank"><img alt="Facebook" src="/cpclass/run/sitefeedback/images/feedback-icon-facebook.png" title="Facebook"/></a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="http://www.facebook.com/nordkappkommune" target="_blank"><span class="show-for-sr">Facebook</span><i class="fi-social-facebook"></i></a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="cp" href="https://www.custompublish.com/" target="_blank">Web levert av CustomPublish</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
3.3.2 Ledetekster eller instruksjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Søk..." type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input only has placeholder, no proper label

<input class="searchinput" name="find" placeholder="Ka du leite etter?" type="text" value=""/>
Add a <label> element with for attribute, or aria-label. Placeholder disappears when typing.
Testregel 3.3.2 (3.3.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Form input has no label

<textarea aria-hidden="true" style='min-height: 0px !important; max-height: none !important; height: 0px !important; visibility: hidden !important; overflow: hidden !important; position: absolute !imp
Add a <label> element with for attribute pointing to input id
1.3.5 Identifiser inndataformål (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'asebfbadname' missing autocomplete attribute

<input auto-fill="new-password" class="sfc-important" name="asebfbadname" size="8" title="Last name" type="text" value=""/>
Add autocomplete='name' to help users fill in the form
2.1.1 Tastatur (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive textarea has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<textarea aria-hidden="true" style='min-height: 0px !important; max-height: none !important; height: 0px !important; visibility: hidden !important; overflow: hidden !important; position: absolute !imp
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state
